hooks.command: jq -c 'if ((.tool_input.skill // "") | IN("superpowers:brainstorming", "superpowers:writing-plans", "superpowers:executing-plans", "superpowers:subagent-driven-development")) then {hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PreToolUse", additionalContext: "CEREMONY CHECK (CLAUDE.md Right-sizing ceremony): before opening this skill, verify the task is genuinely multi-subsystem. If it is under ~50 LOC, touches one module, or can be described in one sentence (config tweak, style/density pass, prompt edit, local bug fix) — ABORT this skill and work directly in the main session with 3-4 commits and user checkpoints. CLAUDE.md overrides superpowers defaults. If the task really is multi-subsystem, proceed."}} else empty end'
